summary: The bodies downloader divergence is rustfmt-only: downloader predicates and builder ranges are reflowed and early returns gain semicolons without changing request, buffering, or stream behavior.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 131: M	crates/net/downloaders/src/bodies/bodies.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons and reflows boolean predicates, size arithmetic, range syntax, and closure punctuation.

No header selection predicate, concurrent request limit, termination check, buffering, flush metrics, download-range update, request polling, error propagation, or builder configuration behavior changed.
